title: Seize the Open File
subtitle: Use the only rook on an open file
summary: Your rook owns the open d-file and the engine has none to contest it. Invade the seventh rank and harvest pawns.

body.goal: Find the rook move that uses the open file best, then convert against the engine.
body.successHint: The seventh rank is where a rook does the most damage. Which square hits two pawns at once?
body.explain: Right. Rd7 plants the rook on the seventh rank, hitting f7 and b7 at once. An open file is only worth something when you actually invade on it.
body.wrong: An open file is a road to the enemy camp — drive down it. Look for the most aggressive square for the rook.

misplays.explain: Rd8+ looks active, but the king just steps up and your rook gets chased back with nothing won. Rd7 grabs the seventh rank where it attacks two pawns.
